title: tetragonia hirsuta
intro: Tetragonia hirsuta, also known as hairy purslane or prickly purslane, is a type of succulent plant native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and wounds, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Tetragonia hirsuta include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of Tetragonia hirsuta include infusions, teas, and salves, which can be used to make topical creams and ointments to treat various health conditions.
